name: Hochschild Mining PLC
description: Hochschild Mining PLC is a leading precious metals company focused on the exploration, mining, processing, and sale of silver and gold. Headquartered in London, the company has over a century of operating history, with its primary underground operations located in the Americas, particularly in Peru, Argentina, and Brazil. Hochschild is committed to high standards of environmental and social responsibility while delivering long-term value through its high-grade underground assets and pipeline of growth projects.
